description: Convert all 3 old-style .csproj files to SDK-style format targeting net8.0, replace DLL references with NuGet PackageReferences, and update the solution file.
steps: Rewrite src/wiresentry/WireSentry.SDK/WireSentry.SDK.csproj as a minimal SDK-style project: <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">, TargetFramework net8.0, OutputType Library, RootNamespace XTSec.SDK, AssemblyName WireSentry.SDK. No PackageReferences needed (this project only uses System.* types). Remove all explicit <Compile> items (SDK-style auto-globs). Remove the old AssemblyInfo.cs attributes by setting <GenerateAssemblyInfo>false</GenerateAssemblyInfo> to keep the existing AssemblyInfo.cs file.

Rewrite src/wiresentry/WireSentry.Scanners.Common/WireSentry.Scanners.Common.csproj as SDK-style: TargetFramework net8.0, OutputType Library, RootNamespace XTSec.Scanners.Common, AssemblyName WireSentry.Scanners.Common. Add ProjectReference to ../WireSentry.SDK/WireSentry.SDK.csproj. Set GenerateAssemblyInfo false. Remove explicit Compile items.

Rewrite src/wiresentry/WireSentry/WireSentry.csproj as SDK-style: TargetFramework net8.0, OutputType Exe (not WinExe - this is a console daemon), RootNamespace WireSentry, AssemblyName WireSentry. Add PackageReferences: SharpPcap 6.3.0, PacketDotNet 1.4.7, MySqlConnector 2.3.7. Add ProjectReferences to ../WireSentry.SDK/WireSentry.SDK.csproj and ../WireSentry.Scanners.Common/WireSentry.Scanners.Common.csproj. Set GenerateAssemblyInfo false. Remove Mono.Posix, System.Data.Linq, MySql.Data, MySql.Data.Entity references (these are replaced by code changes in FEAT-002).
Update src/wiresentry/wiresentryd.sln: keep the existing solution structure but remove the MonoDevelopProperties global section since this is no longer a MonoDevelop project.
acceptance_criteria: WireSentry.csproj has PackageReference entries for SharpPcap 6.3.0, PacketDotNet 1.4.7, and MySqlConnector 2.3.7
WireSentry.csproj has no HintPath DLL references
WireSentry.csproj has no references to Mono.Posix, System.Data.Linq, MySql.Data, or MySql.Data.Entity
Solution file no longer has MonoDevelopProperties section
verification: Validate each .csproj is well-formed XML using xmllint or python xml.etree
Grep each .csproj for 'net8.0' to confirm target framework
Grep WireSentry.csproj for PackageReference to confirm SharpPcap, PacketDotNet, MySqlConnector
Grep all .csproj files to confirm no HintPath elements remain
Grep wiresentryd.sln to confirm MonoDevelopProperties is removed
